lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: BulkPackingService (788 lines) still exists with overlapping packing logic, so the required consolidation with PackingService into one clear service was not completed; expected behavior 'No duplicate packing services' remains unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify mission context discovery in startup steps by listing canonical mission file locations and a fallback workflow when mission.md/AGENTS.md/features.json are not present at expected repo-relative paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer noted a recurring worker deviation around mission file path discovery, with explicit skillFeedback showing lost time locating mission context artifacts before implementation/review work.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the journal-routing rule ambiguity by either allowing documented specialized AccountingFacade methods (such as postPackingJournal) or requiring explicit migration to createStandardJournal for all posting flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Manufacturing review found mixed posting paths in PackingService (postPackingJournal and createStandardJournal) while AGENTS.md currently states all journal creation must go through createStandardJournal.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a 'known tech debt' exception in AGENTS.md for service classes over 500 lines in this area.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented (AGENTS.md already contains the ~500-line rule; this milestone correctly treats current size violations as implementation defects rather than guidance gaps).
